requirements.requirement: Establish a data governance framework with classification, quality standards, and accountability for market and client data
requirements.rationale: Provides foundation for data integrity and protection in capital market operations

requirements.requirement: Implement controls to ensure integrity and timeliness of market data used in trading and reporting
requirements.rationale: Market data integrity is fundamental to fair and orderly market operations

requirements.requirement: Implement comprehensive data protection controls for client information including encryption and DLP
requirements.rationale: Protects client data in compliance with PDPA and SC requirements
